name: Lootly
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by "}, {"text": "Lootly", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://lootly.io/", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website!"}]}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.lootly.io/en/", "children": [{"text": "contact Lootly"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Lootly helps brands launch a personalised rewards program to better connect with existing customers while growing new customers with points, referrals and special VIP tiers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Loyalty and referrals are some of the greatest tools in growing an ecommerce business. Repeat sales are absolutely critical to the long term health of a business, and there\u2019s no better way to accomplish this than with Lootly\u2019s points and referrals system."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Referrals are essentially a free traffic source, you are gaining an army of commission-only sales people who go out into the world and sell your products for you. Your brand in turn, rewards these customers with points or a special coupon every time they drive a new sale to your business."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Combining loyalty and referrals is a one-two punch marketing boost with directly measurable ROI."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Lootly add-on uses the below data from Neto:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Customers"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "RMAs"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Incentivise Actions with Points", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With over a dozen ways to Earn & Spend Points, you can build exciting ways for customers to interact with your Neto store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reward Your Customers", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Offer a variety of ways to reward your loyal customers such as:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "$ Off Coupon"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "% Off Coupon"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Free Product"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Free Shipping"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Variable $ Off Coupon"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Custom Actions via API"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Referral Program", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Give your existing customers a great way to be rewarded for sharing your store with their friends and family."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When a referred user visits your site, they are immediately shown a coupon to use on their first purchase. Lootly makes it easy for everybody to obtain their discount and start shopping on your store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "VIP Program", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Drive repeat purchases, customer loyalty and happiness by introducing a VIP Program."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reward your best customers with exclusive discounts and special promotions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Discover what your Customers Love", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Optimise your loyalty program overtime by understanding which actions & rewards are being utilised the most and adjust your items in just a few clicks."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Lootly also allows you to examine individual customers to get a complete understanding of how a customer is using your program."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the Lootly Add-on"}], "data-id": "install-and-set-up-the-lootly-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the Lootly add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the "}, {"text": "Lootly", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll be redirected to the Lootly dashboard to authenticate or create your account."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the set up steps in the Lootly "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.lootly.io/en/articles/4602552-neto-implementation-guide", "children": [{"text": "help guide"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}]
